step_rationale: Decreased lysophosphatidylcholine predicts heart-failure after MI; myocardial injury and lipid remodeling marker.
mechanism: Decreased LPC (20:3) content post-MI reflects phospholipid catabolism and myocardial dysfunction progression.

references.title: Lipidomic analyses reveal potential biomarkers for predicting death and heart failure after acute myocardial infarction.
references.journal: Clinica chimica acta; international journal of clinical chemistry
